title: Shipwright signal_context
description: Versioned, fully static selector inputs snapshotted at phase entry (R10). Not the live working tree.

tier.description: Semantic model tier for the phase. Fail-closed default: null.

doc_path.description: Frozen review-target document path. Fail-closed default: null.

body_snapshot.description: Frozen body text of the review target. Fail-closed default: empty string.

derived_tags.description: Triage-derived tags computed once from the frozen body. Fail-closed default: [].

file_paths.description: Declared File: paths from the task list. Fail-closed default: [].

change_digest.description: Persisted diff digest for code-review gating. Fail-closed default: null.

phase_type.description: Phase or command slug (e.g. sw-doc-review). Fail-closed default: null.

conductor_mode.description: Durable inline/background_phase flag. Fail-closed default: null.

orchestrator_type.description: Orchestrator entry point that captured this snapshot (PRD 024 TR3).

owner.description: Durable owner: session/ephemeral for debug/feedback; durable/docs-worktree for doc.

signal_type.description: Debug signal classification (error, crash, sentry, etc.).

related_files.description: Debug-related file paths from the inbound signal.

sentry_ref.description: Optional Sentry issue/event reference for debug enrichment.

source_class.description: Feedback signal source class (production, staging, etc.).

invocation.description: Feedback invocation channel; hook/monitor hard-halt under proposed.

route.description: Feedback routing target selected at entry.

capturedAt.description: UTC timestamp when the entry snapshot was taken (before plan validate).
